channel.title: Atrak Blog
channel.description: Insights, tutorials, and stories from building real products

item.title: April 2026 Ship Report: 27 Commits, 6 Active Repos, and a Cleaner Release Feed
item.description: A short, human-readable snapshot of what GitHub says Atrak shipped this week and how it changed the site content.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Project Drop: CourseBinder + Practice Snapshot for Formative
item.description: Two education-focused exporters landed in the project hub: one for visible Google Classroom pages and one for visible Formative practices.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Rebuilding the Atrak Project Hub Around Real GitHub Signals
item.description: How the project section, More Projects slider, weekly news, and releases were refreshed using live public GitHub repo, event, and download data.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Building CompIDE: A Competitive Programming IDE for Real Practice
item.description: How CompIDE was constructed with Electron + Monaco, what broke in packaged builds, and what we learned building a workflow-first contest practice tool.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: C++ Performance Optimization: From Theory to Practice
item.description: Deep dive into C++ optimization techniques we use in production systems. Memory management, cache efficiency, and modern C++20 features that actually matter.
item.author: Yannon Chang

item.title: Building Production Computer Vision Pipelines in Python
item.description: How we built Hoops Clips: a complete guide to production-ready computer vision with PyTorch, OpenCV, and proper error handling.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Building Accessible React Native Apps: Lessons from GuidePup
item.description: A comprehensive guide to accessibility in React Native, covering VoiceOver, semantic HTML, and building apps that work for everyone.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Building GuidePup: An Accessibility-First Approach
item.description: How we built an iOS app for blind users using GPT-4 Vision and React Native, prioritizing accessibility from day one.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Shipping a Production App: Lessons from Ten Seconds VIP Manager
item.description: What we learned building and deploying a real-world restaurant management system used daily in production.
item.author: Charlie Han

item.title: Emergent Behaviors in AI Predator Simulation
item.description: Exploring how simple rules can create complex, realistic hunting behaviors in our Python-based ecosystem simulation.
item.author: Charlie Han
